info.description: Global site configuration: model names (non-secret) and AdSense params (public). OpenAI API keys are sourced from OPENAI_API_KEY / OPENAI_IMAGE_API_KEY env vars.

googleAnalyticsId.description: GA4 Measurement ID for gtag.js (e.g. G-XXXXXXXXXX). Public; injected by codelo-web in production when set.

googleSiteVerification.description: Token for the google-site-verification meta tag (Google Search Console → HTML tag method). Just the content value, not the full tag.

clarityProjectId.description: Microsoft Clarity project ID (clarity.microsoft.com → Settings → Overview). Public; injected by codelo-web in production when set.

houseAdsEnabled.description: Global toggle for self-promotional banners. When true, house-ad entries override AdSense per slot; when false, all slots fall back to AdSense.
